message: Calls completely failing for everyone since 9am ET. Production is dead. Need someone on this NOW.
Mobile app crashes for all supervisors right after login. Board demo in 2 hours. Please help urgently.
We were charged twice on the same day for our annual plan. Need an immediate refund and a clean invoice.
I'm locked out of my admin account after a password reset and our SSO isn't recognising the new email. Can't manage agents at all.

Would love to see Slack integration for missed-call alerts. Would save my team a lot of time.
